summary: This document outlines the logical architecture and decision flow for an AI agent designed to identify a user's favorite person through a series of clustered questions. It details a step-by-step methodology for handling macro-goals, adjusting micro-goals based on new information, and determining when to terminate a conversation path. The content uses a specific test scenario involving 'Rodrigo' to demonstrate how the agent navigates between general inquiries and specific family member clusters.
path_to_original: /Users/eduardolizana/Documents/6. Companies /1. Companies with Rodrigo/KeepMeCompany/3. Product/10. Agents Prompts Refinement/Product - Goals Architecture.xlsx
